_comment: Files outside src/lib/platform/** allowed to import '@tauri-apps/*' directly (architecture-hardening.md F29 / L2-4 gate 2 — lint:platform only greps for removed Electron/Capacitor strings, it does not enforce this). This is a RATCHET: the goal is zero entries over time. Removing an entry (the file grew a platform/ shim, or no longer needs direct access) is always welcome and expected. Adding one should be rare and considered at MR time. A frozen entry that stops importing '@tauri-apps' fails the gate as stale — delete it.
